name: 40 MG Prednisolone Tablets IP
about: 40 MG Prednisolone Tablets IP is a type of general medicine that contains 40mg of the active ingredient Prednisolone. This medicine is manufactured in India and comes in a package of 50x10 tablets. The recommended dosage of this medicine should be taken under the guidance of a doctor. The tablets are in a physical form and should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in 40 MG Prednisolone Tablets IP?
faq.a: The active ingredient in this medicine is Prednisolone.

faq.q: How should I take this medicine?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of this medicine should be taken as per the suggestion of a doctor.

faq.q: How many tablets are present in a package?
faq.a: There are 50x10 tablets present in a package.
This medicine is manufactured in India.

faq.q: What type of medicine is 40 MG Prednisolone Tablets IP?
faq.a: This medicine is a type of general medicine.
